text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 速度快 ↑ 容量大 ↓

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 寄存器 (Register File)
延迟: 0 cycle (流水线内) ~ 1 cycle
带宽: 每 SM ~19.3 TB/s (A100, 理论: 65536 regs × 4B × 1.41GHz)
大小: 每 SM 256KB (65536 × 32-bit), 全 GPU ~27MB
作用域: 每个线程私有
特点: 编译器分配，不可寻址 (不能取指针)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Shared Memory / L1 Cache (统一片上存储)
延迟: ~5 cycles (无 bank conflict)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ~5 × N cycles (N-way bank conflict)
带宽: 每 SM ~19 TB/s → 全 GPU ~2 PB/s (108 SMs)
实测有效带宽: 128 Bytes/cycle/SM (A100)
大小: 每 SM 192KB (Ampere), 可配置为 Shared/L1 比例
作用域: Block 内所有线程共享 (Shared Mem) / SM 私有 (L1 Cache)
特点: SRAM, 程序员显式管理 (Shared) 或硬件管理 (L1)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: L2 Cache
延迟: ~200 cycles (命中) / ~300+ cycles (部分命中)
作用域: 全 GPU 共享, 所有 SM 都能访问
特点: 分 slice, 靠近不同 memory controller

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Ampere+ 支持 L2 Residency Control (锁定数据在 L2)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 全局显存 (Global Memory / HBM)
延迟: ~400-800 cycles (取决于队列深度和 bank conflict)
作用域: 所有线程都能读写, CPU 可通过 PCIe 访问
特点: HBM2e/HBM3, 高带宽但高延迟

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 系统内存 (CPU RAM, 通过 PCIe/NVLink)
带宽: ~32 GB/s (PCIe 4.0) 或 ~600 GB/s (NVLink)
